title: Wrong container status in ps
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Sometimes, some containers report a wrong status with a VERY old age:

```
CONTAINER ID   IMAGE                                                                                                COMMAND                  CREATED         STATUS             PORTS   NAMES                      │
memcached:b32ba15b0e053d6660c35713dec47ff941c11c2e_01511b06    dumb-init --single-...   9 minutes ago   Up 292 years ago           memcached
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run ```podman ps```

**Describe the results you received:**

Wrong container age.

**Describe the results you expected:**

Right container age

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.10.1.3                                                                                                                                                                                            │
Go Version:    go1.10.3                                                                                                                                                                                            │
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```

  Conmon:                                                                                                                                                                                                          │

    version: 'conmon version 1.12.0-dev, commit: 6bfe719b1fca7cbe91ec58c85dd3c6c2aa46cd1e-dirty'                                                                                                                   │
  Distribution:                                                                                                                                                                                                    │
    distribution: '"rhel"'                                                                                                                                                                                         │
    version: "8.0"                                                                                                                                                                                                 │
  MemFree: 11490189312                                                                                                                                                                                             │
  MemTotal: 23360901120                                                                                                                                                                                            │
  OCIRuntime:                                                                                                                                                                                                      │
    package: runc-1.0.0-52.rc5.dev.git2abd837.el8+1884+9fee228c.x86_64                                                                                                                                             │
    path: /usr/bin/runc                                                                                                                                                                                            │
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.0'                                                                                                                                                                            │
  SwapFree: 1073737728                                                                                                                                                                                             │
  SwapTotal: 1073737728                                                                                                                                                                                            │
  arch: amd64                                                                                                                                                                                                      │
  cpus: 8                                                                                                                                                                                                          │
  hostname: undercloud.localdomain                                                                                                                                                                                 │
  kernel: 4.18.0-56.el8.x86_64                                                                                                                                                                                     │
  os: linux                                                                                                                                                                                                        │
  uptime: 2h 53m 40.88s (Approximately 0.08 days)                                                                                                                                                                  │
insecure registries:                                                                                                                                                                                               │
  registries:                                                                                                                                                                                                      │
  - 192.168.24.1:8787                                                                                                                                                                                              │
  - 192.168.24.3:8787                                                                                                                                                                                              │

  - registry.centos.org                                                                                                                                                                                            │
store:                                                                                                                                                                                                             │
  ContainerStore:                                                                                                                                                                                                  │
    number: 46                                                                                                                                                                                                     │
  GraphDriverName: overlay                                                                                                                                                                                         │

  - overlay.mountopt=nodev                                                                                                                                                                                         │
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true                                                                                                                                                                             │
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage                                                                                                                                                                           │
  GraphStatus:                                                                                                                                                                                                     │

    Native Overlay Diff: "true"                                                                                                                                                                                    │
    Supports d_type: "true"                                                                                                                                                                                        │
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
```
[root@undercloud ~]# date                                                                                                                                                                                          │
Tue Jan 15 09:27:05 EST 2019
```
```
[root@undercloud ~]# uptime                                                                                                                                                                                        │
 09:27:10 up  2:53,  2 users,  load average: 0.09, 0.92, 1.71 
```

comments.body:
I know that we've modified the timestamp code for containers since 0.10.1.3 - can you retry with 1.0 or master and check if it's still a problem?

(I'm thinking we're printing and using all-0s timestamps here)
nudge, are we good to go?
